title: Chatbot Q&A + Query Form, Calculator Lead Capture, and Admin Panel

requirements.text: Add a floating chatbot component with keyword-based automated Q&A covering Urban Thekedaar's services, pricing, bookings, and FAQs. The chatbot must match user input against predefined keywords and return relevant responses about construction services, cost ranges, booking process, and common questions.

quotes: Chatbot with keyword-based Q&A covering services, pricing, bookings & FAQs

acceptanceCriteria: Chatbot widget is visible and accessible on the site as a floating button
Typing service-related keywords returns a relevant predefined answer
Typing pricing-related keywords returns cost/pricing information
Typing booking-related keywords returns booking process information
Unanswered queries prompt the user to use the query form

requirements.text: Add a query form inside or alongside the chatbot (or as a dedicated section) that collects: name, phone, email, service type (dropdown), and message. On submission, the data must be stored in the backend and a confirmation message shown to the user.

quotes: a query form (name, phone, email, service type, message) with data stored on-site

acceptanceCriteria: Query form has fields: name, phone, email, service type (dropdown), message
Form validates required fields before submission
Submitted data is persisted in the backend canister
User sees a success confirmation after submission

requirements.text: Update the backend to store query form submissions with fields: name, phone, email, service type, and message. Expose a method to submit a query and a method (admin-only) to retrieve all query submissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend has a submitQuery method accepting name, phone, email, serviceType, message
Backend has a getQueries method that returns all stored query submissions
Data persists across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Update the EstimateCalculator component and backend to include name and mobile number fields. These fields must be collected alongside the existing estimate inputs and stored as calculator leads in the backend.

quotes: Calculator (likely cost/service estimator) with name and mobile number fields added
save the data people for using calculator add name and mobile also in calculator

acceptanceCriteria: Calculator form includes a name field and a mobile number field
Name and mobile are required before submitting the estimate
Submitted calculator leads (name, mobile, project details) are stored in the backend
Backend exposes a method to retrieve calculator leads (admin-only)

requirements.text: Create an Admin Panel page/section accessible via a hardcoded username and password login (no Internet Identity required). Once logged in, the admin can view all submitted query form entries and all calculator leads in separate tabs or sections. The hardcoded credentials must be defined as constants in the frontend code.

quotes: Admin panel with a hardcoded login (username + password) to view submitted queries and calculator leads

acceptanceCriteria: A login screen with username and password fields is shown before accessing the admin panel
Entering the correct hardcoded credentials grants access to the admin panel
Entering wrong credentials shows an error message
Admin panel displays all query form submissions with name, phone, email, service type, and message
Admin panel displays all calculator leads with name, mobile, and project details
Submissions and leads are displayed in a readable table or card list
Admin can log out and return to the login screen

requirements.text: Update the backend to store calculator leads with fields: name, mobile, and all existing estimate inputs (project type, area, floors, quality tier, address). Expose an admin-only method to retrieve all calculator leads.

quotes: save the data people for using calculator add name and mobile also in calculator
Admin panel with a hardcoded login (username + password) to view submitted queries and calculator leads

acceptanceCriteria: Backend has a submitCalculatorLead method that stores name, mobile, and estimate inputs
Backend has a getCalculatorLeads method that returns all stored leads
Data persists across canister upgrades

constraints: Admin panel login must use hardcoded credentials stored in frontend constants — no Internet Identity required for admin login
All data storage must use the existing single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real-time AI or LLM-based chatbot responses
